'''Evo the Blue''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who was the leader of the [[Cairn Clan]] from [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. During a Clan War in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], he was killed by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] with a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]].
